description:
Skini **SR_Manager.zip**, raspakiraj i pokreni **Pokreni SR Manager.bat** (ili SR Manager.vbs).

**NE** pokreci SRManager.exe - to je stari installer.

fields.name: Koraci
fields.value:
1. Skini ZIP
2. Raspakiraj cijeli folder
3. Pokreni Pokreni SR Manager.bat

fields.name: SR Manager (vs generic hub)
fields.value:
- Vise FS25 servera + ping i live status
- Licenca / HWID / probna 3 dana (bot API)
- SHA-256 mod manifest i sync (server-authoritative)
- GitHub auto-update (ZIP + SlavonskaRavnica.ps1)
- Admin mod, bot config sync, session heartbeat
